lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Aye, 'tis a fair day my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not your friend.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I'm surprised if you're anyone's friend with those kind of manners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it's a very nice day.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Aye, may the gods walk by yer side. Now leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I ain't got nothing to sell ye, adventurer. Leave me be!

sections.title: If the player has an anti-dragon shield equipped or in their inventory

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Aye, 'tis a fair day, my mighty dragon-slaying friend.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I see ye've got one of them anti-dragon shields there. I've got an idea about them things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's your idea about anti-dragon shields?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: See, when ye uses them to fight a dragon, they absorb the fire. The shield must be storing the dragonfire, and just letting it radiate away.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Now, if there was only a way to get the dragonfire out again...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What use would that be?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Why, ain't it obvious? Ye could project blasts of dragonfire from yer shield!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Ye know, I think there might be a way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What way?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I've heard legends of a thing called a 'draconic visage'. It was made by the dragonkin themselves apparently.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: This 'draconic visage' had the power to channel dragonfire. Now, if I could attach the visage to the front of this shield...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will look for this draconic visage!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Good luck wi' that. They're mighty rare, so yer quest will take some time. If any monsters have them, it'll be the dragons.

sections.title: If the player has a draconic visage in their inventory

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Aye, 'tis a fair day, my mighty dragon-slaying friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look at this visage.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Amazin'! Ye can almost feel it pulsing with draconic power!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Now, if ye bring me this and the anti-dragonbreath shield, I reckon I could combine them into something pretty special!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Now, if ye want me to, I could attach this to yer anti-dragonbreath shield and make something pretty special.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I'll charge 1,250,000 coins to construct it. What d'ye say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: There ye go. Now, the more dragonfire the shield absorbs, the more powerful it'll become.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Suit yerself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a bit expensive!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Yes it is. But I'm a master smith so I reckon I can charge what I like. Unless ye've got level 90 Smithing too, which I doubt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't have level 90 Smithing.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I thought not. I'm the master smith of Misthalin! So, shall I construct the shield for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I have got level 90 Smithing.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Oh! Well, I suppose ye don't need me for this then.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Aye, 'tis a fair day, my mighty dragon-slaying friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a rune platebody now please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another key to Melzar's Maze?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: It's the Guildmaster in the Champions' Guild who hands those keys out now. Go talk to him. No need to bother me if you don't need armour.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: That isn't right, keep trying.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Well done, traveller.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: The solving of this puzzle could be the key to your treasure.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: This shield turned up, recently... I believe it belongs to you.
